g.text: Classical ML · scikit-learn · PyTorch · Flask/FastAPI · one project = one container
Key rule: Each project under ml/ is fully self-contained — its own 3 layers, its own container, its own API. The presentation-
logic/ + application-logic/ + db-logic/ are all packaged into ONE Docker image. Model weights and data live outside — mounted
from NAS (dev) or pulled from S3 (AWS).
api/ → main.py · routes.py · schemas.py · middleware.py · dependencies.py
↑ calls application-logic/ only · never touches db-logic/ directly
↑ calls db-logic/ only · pure ML logic · no HTTP awareness
↑ called by application-logic/ · abstracts disk / S3 / PostgreSQL
config.py · logger.py · metrics.py · constants.py · exceptions.py · utils.py
↑ used by all 3 layers · no layer-specific logic here
checkpoints/ · artifacts/ · pulled from S3 at container startup via entrypoint.sh
Identical structure: presentation-logic/ · application-logic/ · db-logic/ · shared/
+ notebooks/ · tests/ · data/ · models/ · configs/ · docker/ · pyproject.toml · Makefile
📁 _templates/ ← copy to scaffold a new project instantly
Neural networks · TensorFlow · PyTorch · FastAPI · Transformers
Same pattern as ml/ — each DL project is self-contained with the identical 3-layer structure. Model checkpoints (.pt / .h5) are
gitignored and S3-synced. dl- prefix on project names avoids ambiguity when browsing GitHub.
↑ calls db-logic/ only · pure DL logic
↑ abstracts all data sources for the application layer
notebooks/ · tests/presentation/ · tests/application/ · tests/db/ · data/ · models/ · configs/ · docker/
📁 _templates/ ← copy to scaffold a new project
Utilities, datasets, scripts shared across all ML and DL projects
— common datasets across projects · gitignored · NAS + S3
— shared helper functions, logging wrappers, common transforms
— data prep, batch processing, evaluation scripts
— cross-project YAML defaults, base model configs
Docker Compose stacks · Nginx proxy · dev / staging / prod env configs
— adds ml-cnn-api · dl-lstm-api · NAS volume mounts
— all .env files gitignored · only .example files committed
IaC · GitHub Actions · AWS configs · Monitoring · Sync scripts
— CloudFormation / Terraform IaC — VPC · EC2 · S3 · IAM · ALB · ECS
— GitHub Actions workflow templates + secrets documentation
— scripts to sync models/ + data/ → S3 staging / prod buckets
— Prometheus · Grafana configs · CloudWatch dashboards · alert rules
pandyahomelab.com source · maps to your existing personal-website container · CI/CD
— maps to /volume1/docker/my-website/html (your existing nginx container mount)
ADRs · Runbooks · Learning journal · References · Architecture diagrams
— ADRs · platform diagrams · 3-layer decision record · this infographic
— NAS setup · Docker ops · AWS deploy · backup/restore · SSL renewal
— weekly notes · experiment results · model benchmarks · lessons
— papers · courses · links organised by ML/DL topic
Free-form WIP sandbox · promoted to ml/ or dl/ when mature · never tracked in GitHub
— free-form scratch notebooks and throwaway scripts
— work-in-progress · copy to ml/ or dl/ when 3-layer structure is ready
— completed experiments kept for local NAS reference only
